hero.title: Exclusive massage for your
hero.subtitle: Professional massage therapy in Stockholm. Find your balance, release tension, and restore your energy in a luxurious spa atmosphere.

about.title: The art of healing
about.quote: “My goal is not just to relax muscles, but to restore the inner balance and harmony of your body.”
about.text1: Hello, I am Oleg. I am a certified massage therapist with over 10 years of professional experience. My goal is to help you release pain, stress, and muscle tension by combining classic techniques with customized therapies.
about.text2: Every session is tailored to your specific needs – whether you require deep tissue relief after an intense workout or a calming session to soothe daily stress.

advantages.title: Why choose
advantages.expDesc: Deep understanding of anatomy and physiology ensures safe, effective, and target-oriented therapy.
advantages.indDesc: Every session is designed around your specific physical needs, preferences, and focus areas.
advantages.atmDesc: A serene, private, and premium spa room equipped for your absolute comfort and relaxation.

classic.title: Classic Massage
classic.desc: A traditional Swedish massage designed for deep muscle tension relief, improving microcirculation, accelerating lymph flow, and restoring the natural energy balance of the entire body.
classic.benefit: Effectively eliminates muscle spasms and stiffness, restores muscle fiber elasticity, normalizes sleep, reduces stress levels, and brings a profound sense of inner emotional harmony.
classic.seo_title: Classic Swedish Massage Stockholm | Oleg Massage
classic.seo_desc: Traditional Swedish massage for deep relaxation and blood circulation improvement. Professional massage therapist Oleg in Stockholm.
classic.process_title: What to Expect during the Session
classic.process_text: The classic massage session begins with gentle, preparatory strokes using warm premium organic oil. This carefully prepares the skin and sets the nervous system for deep relaxation. The therapist then transitions to more active techniques: deep friction, kneading, and gentle wringing. Special attention is given to areas with high muscle tension — the neck and shoulder girdle, the entire length of the spine, and the lower back. Through targeted pressure and smooth stretching motions, deep muscle knots are released, blood circulation is enhanced, and joint mobility is restored. The session concludes with soothing vibrational strokes to normalize heart rate, stabilize breathing, and leave you in a state of absolute peace and complete recovery.
classic.contraindications_text: Acute inflammatory processes, fever, infectious skin conditions, severe varicose veins.

anti-cellulite.title: Anti-Cellulite Massage
anti-cellulite.desc: An intensive sculpting treatment aimed at actively combating local fat deposits, eliminating fluid retention, and restoring the natural elasticity and firmness of the skin.
anti-cellulite.benefit: Activates microcirculation in tissues, promotes rapid drainage of excess fluid, reduces swelling, tightens the skin, and visibly sculpts body contours.
anti-cellulite.seo_title: Anti-Cellulite Massage Stockholm | Body Sculpting & Firming
anti-cellulite.seo_desc: Professional anti-cellulite massage in Stockholm. Improve skin elasticity, boost lymphatic flow, and sculpt body contours.
indications_list: Loss of skin tone and elasticity
anti-cellulite.process_title: What to Expect during the Session
anti-cellulite.process_text: The anti-cellulite massage session begins with the application of a special natural warming oil containing active botanical extracts to accelerate lipolysis. The therapist employs intensive and energetic techniques: deep kneading, friction, rolling, and light tapping. These movements are designed to target the subcutaneous fat layer, break down fibrous tissue, and stimulate collagen production. Special attention is focused on problem areas — the thighs, buttocks, and abdomen. The intensive work alternates with lymphatic drainage strokes, accelerating the removal of broken-down fat cells and accumulated toxins. The treatment finishes with calming drainage strokes to normalize vascular tone, relieve stress on the skin, and speed up tissue regeneration.
anti-cellulite.contraindications_text: Pregnancy, fragile capillaries, severe varicose veins, skin inflammation in the treated areas.

sports.title: Sports Massage
sports.desc: An intensive deep-tissue massage developed specifically to prepare muscles for athletic activities, accelerate post-workout recovery, and prevent sports injuries.
sports.benefit: Effectively relieves muscle hypertonus and fatigue, eliminates trigger points, accelerates lactic acid clearance, and significantly increases overall range of motion.
sports.seo_desc: Deep sports massage for athletes and active individuals. Relieve muscle tension, prepare for exercise, and recover faster in Stockholm.
sports.process_title: What to Expect during the Session
sports.process_text: The sports massage begins with vigorous friction and warming of major muscle groups using therapeutic sports recovery balms. The therapist performs deep-tissue manipulation, applying firm pressure, compression, and cross-fiber friction. Using trigger point therapy, the session targets deep spasms and fascial adhesions caused by heavy athletic stress. Elements of passive stretching for joints and ligaments are integrated to restore muscle flexibility and increase range of motion. The treatment concludes with light lymphatic drainage strokes, which accelerate the clearance of metabolic waste products, reduce post-workout soreness, and promote rapid muscle recovery.
sports.contraindications_text: Fresh muscle or ligament injuries, fractures, acute joint inflammation, skin cuts or open wounds.

lymphatic-drainage.title: Lymphatic Drainage
lymphatic-drainage.desc: A gentle and soothing manual technique designed to stimulate the lymphatic system, cleanse the body of toxins, and eliminate excess fluid retention.
lymphatic-drainage.benefit: Effectively reduces swelling in the face and limbs, strengthens the immune system, accelerates natural detox processes, and restores a feeling of lightness to the body.
lymphatic-drainage.seo_title: Lymphatic Drainage Massage Stockholm | Detox & De-puff
lymphatic-drainage.seo_desc: Gentle lymphatic drainage massage to eliminate toxins, boost immunity, and reduce swelling. Professional therapy in Stockholm.
lymphatic-drainage.process_title: What to Expect during the Session
lymphatic-drainage.process_text: The lymphatic drainage treatment is performed using extremely soft, slow, rhythmic, and wave-like pumping and sweeping strokes along the natural pathways of the lymphatic system. The therapist begins by gently opening and stimulating key lymph nodes (clavicular, axillary, and inguinal). Next, fluid is gently guided from the limbs towards these central drainage nodes. The process is completely painless, causes no skin redness, and has a deeply relaxing effect on the nervous system. It effectively stimulates the removal of excess interstitial fluid, resolves congestion, relieves heavy legs, and improves overall wellness.
lymphatic-drainage.contraindications_text: Oncological diseases, thrombophlebitis, thyroid disorders, acute infections.

cupping.title: Cupping Massage
cupping.desc: A unique therapeutic method combining classic manual massage and local vacuum suction for deep-tissue relief of chronically tense and tight muscles.
cupping.benefit: Effectively relieves chronic back and neck pain, releases dense fascial structures, improves tissue oxygenation, and eliminates deep muscular congestion.
cupping.seo_title: Vacuum Cupping Massage Stockholm | Oleg Massage
cupping.seo_desc: Deep vacuum cupping massage to boost microcirculation, relieve chronic back pain, and release muscle spasms in Stockholm.
cupping.process_title: What to Expect during the Session
cupping.process_text: The session begins with the application of a generous layer of warm organic oil to ensure smooth gliding. The therapist manually warms up the muscles of the back and neck. Next, specialized silicone or vacuum cups are placed on the skin. By smoothly moving them along the key muscle lines and spine, the therapist creates a controlled vacuum. This negative pressure acts deeply on the tissues, stretches tight fascia, and brings a powerful rush of fresh, oxygenated blood to tight muscles. The treatment aids in releasing cellular waste and melting stiffness. Temporary redness or marks may appear, which is normal and indicates the start of cellular regeneration.
cupping.contraindications_text: Blood diseases, fragile blood vessels, moles or birthmarks in the treatment zone, acute inflammation.

hot-stone.title: Hot Stone Massage
hot-stone.desc: An exclusive spa thermotherapy treatment based on the application of heated volcanic basalt stones to provide deep warming and relaxation to the body.
hot-stone.benefit: Completely relieves physical and mental tension, warms deep muscle layers, improves sleep quality, and balances the autonomic nervous system.
hot-stone.seo_title: Hot Stone Massage Stockholm | Premium Stone Therapy
hot-stone.seo_desc: Luxurious hot basalt stone massage for deep muscle heating, stress relief, and energy restoration in Stockholm.
hot-stone.process_title: What to Expect during the Session
hot-stone.process_text: The session begins with a gentle manual back massage using aromatic oil to prepare the tissues for the heat. Smooth volcanic basalt stones, heated to a comfortable temperature, are then placed along key energy points along the spine and on the palms. The stones release deep, soothing heat that penetrates into the muscles, melting away chronic spasms and calming the nervous system. The therapist then performs massage movements using both the warm stones and hands, targeting the back, shoulders, and limbs with smooth gliding strokes. This thermal therapy improves circulation, aids in toxin elimination, relieves accumulated stress, and restores a sense of complete serenity.
hot-stone.contraindications_text: Heat sensitivity, high blood pressure, diabetes, skin rashes.

turkish-foam.title: Turkish Foam Massage
turkish-foam.desc: An authentic oriental spa ritual in the hammam, combining deep skin exfoliation with a silk Kese glove and a relaxing massage in a cloud of organic soap foam.
turkish-foam.benefit: Gently removes dead skin cells, opens pores, improves skin oxygenation, eliminates toxins, and gives a sensation of absolute cleanliness and lightness.
turkish-foam.seo_title: Turkish Foam Massage Stockholm | Luxurious Spa Ritual
turkish-foam.seo_desc: Indulgent foam massage on a heated stone bed. Gentle scrub with Kese glove and relaxing massage with organic olive oil soap foam.
turkish-foam.process_title: What to Expect during the Session
turkish-foam.process_text: The ritual takes place in a warm room on a special heated stone table. First, the therapist performs a full-body scrub using a traditional silk Kese glove to gently exfoliate dead skin cells and open the pores. Then, a dense, warm cloud of soap foam made from organic olive soap is created and covers the entire body. The therapist performs a relaxing massage over this airy foam, gently working on the joints, ligaments, and muscles. The warm foam deeply cleanses, nourishes, and hydrates the skin. The treatment concludes with a warm rinse, leaving the skin incredibly smooth, firm, and glowing, and your mind completely at peace.
turkish-foam.contraindications_text: Allergy to soap ingredients, open skin wounds, cardiovascular diseases.

natural-massage.title: Eco-Organic Massage
natural-massage.desc: A delicate rejuvenating treatment for the face and body using 100% organic, cold-pressed botanical oils and natural aromatherapy.
natural-massage.benefit: Effectively relieves facial muscle tension, improves skin elasticity, eliminates puffiness, and deeply nourishes tissues with essential nutrients.
natural-massage.seo_desc: Gentle restorative eco-massage using 100% natural, cold-pressed organic oils and aromatherapy in Stockholm.
natural-massage.process_title: What to Expect during the Session
natural-massage.process_text: The session begins with choosing an essential oil that aligns with your emotional state. Only pure, cold-pressed plant-based oils without synthetic fragrances are used. The therapist performs a gentle massage of the face, neck, décolleté, and scalp, incorporating lymphatic drainage, sculpting, and anti-stress techniques. Every movement is tailored to relax facial muscles, stimulate lymph flow, and improve skin tone. The massage helps smooth fine lines, lift facial contours, and deeply nourish the skin. The scents of natural essential oils calm the nervous system, melt away stress, and restore inner emotional balance.
natural-massage.contraindications_text: Allergies to essential oils, active allergic skin reactions, pregnancy.

items.name: Johan Andersson
items.text: Oleg is an incredible therapist. After the sports massage, I felt like a new person. My shoulders have never felt this mobile.

items.name: Sofia Lindqvist
items.text: The hot stone massage was pure magic. The premium and serene atmosphere made the experience absolutely unforgettable. Highly recommended!

items.name: Erik Bergqvist
items.text: Professional service and outstanding skills. The lymphatic drainage massage helped me get rid of bloating and fatigue.

contacts.subtitle: Book your session online or reach out via phone. Our private studio is located in the heart of Stockholm.
